name: Chicken in Mustard "Cream" Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Dredge the chicken in flour.
2. Heat oil in a skillet and brown the chicken on both sides for about 7-10 minutes.
3. Stir a little chicken broth into dry mustard and cornstarch to make a paste. Then stir in the rest of the broth; add pepper.
4. When the breasts are browned, remove and keep warm. Deglaze the pan with sherry.
5. Add the mustard mixture and return the chicken to the pan. Cook until the mixture thickens.
6. Process ricotta with yogurt until smooth. Remove the chicken when cooked, turn off the heat, and quickly stir in the ricotta mixture.
7. Do not boil. Serve the sauce over the chicken and sprinkle with parsley.
